title: pomaria stipularis
intro: Pomaria stipularis, also known as the prairie clover or hairy prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pomaria stipularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
